title: Vicus - Realistic Villages
description: Village and villager names based on the biome.
body:
- Realistic Villages adds names to villagers and villages based on their biome type and their profession. At least 100 unique given names, surnames, and place names for each biome, often more.
- Stealing from villages now makes them hostile, and if you steal enough the iron golem will attack.
- Illagers are no longer hostile unless provoked or part of a raid.

<details>
<summary>Naming Conventions</summary>

- Plains villagers have English based names, with a chance of german and french surnames.
- Taiga villagers have German based names, with a chance of slavic based surnames.
- Snowy villagers have Russian based names, with a chance of both german and slavic surnames.
- Desert villagers have Arabic based names.
- Savanna villagers have African based names.
- Illagers have Slavic based names, with a chance of russian surnames.
- Witches have female biblical given names and french based surnames.
- Swamp villagers have french based names.
- Jungle villagers have Spanish based names.

</details>
